name: A/B Hook Testing Engine
description: Generates 2 opening hook variants per lead for Module A, randomizes assignment, tracks which variant converts, and feeds winning patterns back to Nemotron.

payload.prompt: Generate opening hook VARIANT A for outbound call. Lead: {{trigger.name}}. Segment: {{trigger.segment}}. Zone: {{trigger.zone}}. Property value: {{trigger.property_value}}. Style: direct risk statement about unmonitored property.

Generate opening hook VARIANT B for outbound call. Lead: {{trigger.name}}. Segment: {{trigger.segment}}. Zone: {{trigger.zone}}. Property value: {{trigger.property_value}}. Style: value proposition and service benefit lead-in.

config.description: Randomly assign variant and record test allocation
config.code: const variant = Math.random() < 0.5 ? 'A' : 'B'; const selectedHook = variant === 'A' ? inputData.hook_a : inputData.hook_b; output = { selected_variant: variant, hook_a: inputData.hook_a, hook_b: inputData.hook_b, active_hook: selectedHook, test_id: 'AB-' + Date.now(), lead_id: inputData.lead_id };
